title: Tri-Ply Stainless Steel Frying pan 28cm, Skillet 11inch, Induction Cooking Pan, Fast & Even Heat, Compatible with All Cooktops Up to 315℃
features: Nontoxicook Tri-Ply Stainless Steel Frying Pan Efficient Allows Heat to Pass Through the Entire Pan Fast. Please Do Not Heat the Empty Cooker. Suggest Cooking with Medium-Low Heat

28CM/11 inch Pan Combines 18/10 Stainless Steel, an Aluminium Core, and 18/0 Outer Stainless Steel. Stainless Steel Pan 11 inch Allows Heat to Pass Through the Entire Pan, Bottom to Sidewall, with Quick & Even Heat

Nontoxicook Frying pan Can Save Fuel By Up To 20%. Efficient Heating, Energy Savings Make It a Great Choice for Cooks Seeking Both Performance and Savings. 3-Layer Metal Construction Delivers Performance and Durability for Years to Come

Nontoxicook Frying Pan with Lid's 18/10 Stainless Steel Cooking Surface Won't React with Food to Alter Natural Tastes, Delivers Fresh, Flavorful Results. Nontoxicook 28cm Stainless Steel Frying Pan also has More Surface Area than the Average 11 inch Skillet on the Market, Providing a Wider Cooking Space

Stainless Steel Frying Pan is Not Only Durable and Heavy-Duty But Also Enables Its Body to Withstand a High Temperature of Up To 550°F. The Sturdy Hollow Handle Design Reduces Heat Transfer. The Clear Tempered Glass Lid Stays On Tight, Making It Easy To Monitor Your Meals At All Times.Featuring a Steam Vent For Safety, and a Sturdy Hollow Handle Design To Reduce Heat Transfer
description: From the brand Previous page A Commitment to Durability We believe in “buy less, buy better”—a philosophy that aligns with UK values of sustainability and quality. Our fully-clad tri-ply construction (stainless steel + aluminum core) is bonded from rim to rim, so it won’t warp, peel, or lose heat distribution over time. This isn’t cookware for a year—it’s cookware for birthdays, holidays, and passing down to the next generation. Join the Nontoxicook Family Today, thousands of UK home cooks trust Nontoxicook to turn everyday meals into memorable moments. Whether you’re frying eggs for breakfast, stir-frying veggies for dinner, or braising a Sunday roast, our stainless steel cookware is with you every step of the way—safe, reliable, and designed to make cooking feel like a pleasure, not a chore. Next page
